title: ADR: choose a rate-limit counter store
task: Choose between Redis, Postgres, gateway-native rate limiting, and local token bucket fallback for /login counters.
baseline_prompt: Write an ADR choosing a backing store for /login rate-limit counters. Consider Redis, Postgres, gateway-native rate limiting, and local token bucket fallback. Cover decision, context, alternatives considered, consequences, and how the decision will be validated before rollout.
polymath_prompt: Write an ADR choosing a backing store for /login rate-limit counters. Consider Redis, Postgres, gateway-native rate limiting, and local token bucket fallback. Cover decision, context, alternatives considered, consequences, and how the decision will be validated before rollout. Use Polymath's ADR authoring skill and the structured decision-comparison skill in the decisions plugin, then have a forked-context reviewer challenge the result.
